augments.name: Accelerating Sorcery
augments.desc:
Using Abilities grant you stacking Ability Haste.

This resets each round.
augments.tooltip: Using an Ability grants <scaleAbilityHaste>@HastePerCast@ Ability Haste</scaleAbilityHaste>, stacking infinitely, this resets each round.

augments.name: Blood Brother
augments.desc:
Gain Darius's Passive Hemorrhage.

Attacks and damaging Abilities cause the target to Hemorrhage, dealing @BleedDamagePerStack@ physical damage over @BleedDuration@ seconds, stacking up to @MaxStacks@ times.

Draven gains @NoxianMightBonusAD@ Attack Damage at @MaxStacks@ Hemorrhage stacks.
augments.tooltip:
Gain Darius's Passive Hemorrhage.

Attacks and damaging Abilities cause the target to Hemorrhage, dealing @BleedDamagePerStack@ physical damage over @BleedDuration@ seconds, stacking up to @MaxStacks@ times.

Draven gains @NoxianMightBonusAD@ Attack Damage at @MaxStacks@ Hemorrhage stacks.

augments.name: Apex Inventor
augments.desc:
Gain @ItemHaste@ Item Haste (equivalent to @TooltipCDR@% Item CDR).

Item Haste reduces the cooldown %i:cooldown% of all Item Abilities.
augments.tooltip:
Gain @ItemHaste@ Item Haste (equivalent to @TooltipCDR@% Item CDR).

Item Haste reduces the cooldown %i:cooldown% of all Item Abilities.

augments.name: Null Augment
augments.desc: Null
augments.tooltip: Null

augments.name: Back To Basics
augments.desc: Gain increased Ability Damage, <healing>Healing</healing>, <shield>Shielding</shield>, and <scaleAbilityHaste>Ability Haste</scaleAbilityHaste>, but you <keywordMajor>cannot use your Ultimate Ability</keywordMajor>.
augments.tooltip: Your Ultimate Ability is sealed. Gain @DamageAmp*100@% Ability Damage, <healing>Healing</healing>, <shield>Shielding</shield>, and <scaleAbilityHaste>@Haste@ Ability Haste</scaleAbilityHaste>.

augments.name: Banner of Command
augments.desc:
Gain the Banner of Command Summoner Spell.

Banner of Command empowers your ally for a brief duration.
augments.tooltip: Your ally gains a bonus @EmpowermentValue*100@% <scaleHealth>Health</scaleHealth>, <scaleAD>Attack Damage</scaleAD>, <scaleAP>Ability Power</scaleAP>, <attackSpeed>Attack Speed</attackSpeed> and Size for @BuffDuration@ seconds.

augments.name: Divine Intervention
augments.desc:
Shortly after combat starts, call a protective star. Upon its landing, you and nearby allies become Invulnerable for a few seconds.

Then Autocast this every @BaseCD@ seconds.
augments.tooltip: @InitalDelay@ seconds into combat, call upon a protective star that slowly descends upon you. When it lands, you and nearby allies become <keywordMajor>Invulnerable</keywordMajor> for @InvulnerabilityDuration@ seconds. Then <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> this every @BaseCD@ seconds.

augments.name: Blade Waltz
augments.desc:
Gain the Blade Waltz Summoner Spell.

Blade Waltz makes you untargetable while you dash at and damage enemies @TotalHits@ times.
augments.tooltip:
Makes you untargetable while you dash at and deal @Damage@ damage to enemies @TotalHits@ times (deals 50% on-hit damage).

Damage Dealt This Round: @f1@
Damage Dealt Total: @f2@

augments.name: Don't Chase
augments.desc: You become Ghosted and leave a trail of poisonous gas behind you, dealing <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> to enemies inside.
augments.tooltip:
You become Ghosted and leave a trail of poisonous gas behind you, dealing @DamagePerSecond@ magic damage per second to enemies inside.

Damage Dealt This Round: @f1@
Damage Dealt Total: @f2@

augments.name: Blunt Force
augments.desc: Gain %i:scaleAD% <scaleAD>@ADAmp*100@% Attack Damage</scaleAD>.
augments.tooltip: Gain <scaleAD>@ADAmp*100@% (@f1@) Attack Damage</scaleAD>.

augments.name: Sacrifice: For Silver
augments.desc: After @RoundCountCap@ rounds, gain a bonus <keywordMajor>Silver Augment</keywordMajor>.
augments.tooltip:
After @RoundCountCap@ rounds, gain a bonus Silver Augment.

Rounds Remaining: @f1@

augments.name: Buff Buddies
augments.desc:
You gain Crest of Cinders and Crest of Insight.

Granting yourself Ability Haste and resource regeneration and causing your Attacks to Burn and Slow enemy champions.
augments.tooltip:
You gain Crest of Cinders and Crest of Insight.

Crest of Cinders: Basic attacks Burn and Slow enemy champions. While out of combat heal a percentage of your maximum health.

Crest of Insight: Gain Ability Haste, and restore Mana and Energy each second.

augments.name: Cannon Fodder
augments.desc: You enter combat launching from a cannon.
augments.tooltip: You enter combat launching from a cannon.

augments.name: Blood Brother
augments.desc:
Gain Darius's Passive Hemorrhage.

Attacks and damaging Abilities cause the target to Hemorrhage, dealing @BleedDamagePerStack@ physical damage over @BleedDuration@ seconds, stacking up to @MaxStacks@ times.

Draven gains @NoxianMightBonusAD@ Attack Damage at @MaxStacks@ Hemorrhage stacks.
augments.tooltip:
Gain Darius's Passive Hemorrhage.

Attacks and damaging Abilities cause the target to Hemorrhage, dealing @BleedDamagePerStack@ physical damage over @BleedDuration@ seconds, stacking up to @MaxStacks@ times.

Draven gains @NoxianMightBonusAD@ Attack Damage at @MaxStacks@ Hemorrhage stacks.

augments.name: Can't Touch This
augments.desc: Casting your <attention>Ultimate</attention> makes you <keywordMajor>Invulnerable</keywordMajor> for a short duration.
augments.tooltip: Casting your <attention>Ultimate</attention> makes you <status>Invulnerable</status> for @InvulnDuration@ seconds (@Cooldown@s Cooldown).

augments.name: Castle
augments.desc:
Gain the Castle Summoner Spell.

Castle: Swap places with your ally, gaining Move Speed and a Shield.
augments.tooltip:
Gain the Castle Summoner Spell.

Swap places with your ally, granting you both @PercentMovementSpeedMod*100@% Move Speed and a @TotalShield@ Shield for @MSBuffDuration@ seconds.

augments.name: Celestial Body
augments.desc: Gain <scaleHealth>@Health@ Health</scaleHealth>, but you deal @DamageReduction*100@% less damage.
augments.tooltip: Gain <scaleHealth>@Health@ Health</scaleHealth>, but you deal @DamageReduction*100@% less damage.

augments.name: Chauffeur
augments.desc:
You are attached to your ally and can't move on your own.

Your bonus Move Speed is also granted to your ally, and you gain Ability Haste and Attack Speed.
augments.tooltip: {{ Cherry_Chauffeur@TeamSize@_Tooltip }}

augments.name: Divine Intervention
augments.desc:
Shortly after combat starts, call a protective star. Upon its landing, you and nearby allies become Invulnerable for a few seconds.

Then Autocast this every @BaseCD@ seconds.
augments.tooltip: @InitalDelay@ seconds into combat, call upon a protective star that slowly descends upon you. When it lands, you and nearby allies become <keywordMajor>Invulnerable</keywordMajor> for @InvulnerabilityDuration@ seconds. Then <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> this every @BaseCD@ seconds.

augments.name: Circle of Death
augments.desc: <healing>Healing</healing> and <healing>Health Regen</healing> you do deals a portion of the value as <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> to the nearest enemy champion.
augments.tooltip:
Healing and Health Regen you do deals @HealToDamageConversion*100@% of the value magic damage to the nearest enemy champion.

Damage Dealt This Round: @f1@
Damage Dealt Total: @f2@

augments.desc: You become Ghosted and leave a trail of poisonous gas behind you, dealing <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> to enemies inside.
augments.tooltip:

Damage Dealt Total: @f2@

augments.name: Combo Master
augments.desc: Gain the <spellName>Electrocute</spellName> and <spellName>Phase Rush</spellName> Keystone Runes.
augments.tooltip:
Gain the Electrocute and Phase Rush Keystone Runes.
  • Electrocute - Hitting 3 separate Attacks or Abilities within 3 seconds deals a burst of damage.
  • Phase Rush - Hitting 3 separate Attacks or Abilities within 4 seconds grants you Move Speed and Slow Resist for a few seconds.

augments.name: Sacrifice: For Silver
augments.desc: After @RoundCountCap@ rounds, gain a bonus <keywordMajor>Silver Augment</keywordMajor>.
augments.tooltip:
After @RoundCountCap@ rounds, gain a bonus Silver Augment.

Rounds Remaining: @f1@

augments.name: Contract Killer
augments.desc:
Each round, mark an opposing champion.

That champion takes @DamageAmp*100@% extra damage and grants an +%i:goldCoins%@Gold@ gold when killed.
augments.tooltip:
Each round, mark an opposing champion.

That champion takes @DamageAmp*100@% extra damage and grants an +%i:goldCoins% @Gold@ gold when killed.

augments.name: Bread And Butter
augments.desc: Your @spell1KeyBind@ gains @QAbilityHaste@ Ability Haste.
augments.tooltip: Your @spell1KeyBind@ gains @QAbilityHaste@ Ability Haste.

augments.name: Courage of the Colossus
augments.desc: Gain @TotalShield@ Shield after Immobilizing or Grounding an enemy champion.
augments.tooltip:
Gain @TotalShield@ Shield after Immobilizing or Grounding an enemy champion.

Shields Generated This Round: @f1@
Shields Generated Total: @f2@

augments.name: Sacrifice: For Gold
augments.desc:
Sacrifice @HealthReduction*100@% of your current health.

After @RoundCountCap@ rounds, gain a bonus Gold Augment and restore your health.
augments.tooltip:
Sacrifice @HealthReduction*100@% of your current health.

After @RoundCountCap@ rounds, gain a bonus Gold Augment and restore your health.

Rounds Remaining: @f1@

augments.name: Dashing
augments.desc: Your dash, leap, blink, or teleport Abilities gain <scaleAbilityHaste>@Haste@ Ability Haste</scaleAbilityHaste>.
augments.tooltip: Your dash, leap, blink, or teleport Abilities gain <scaleAbilityHaste>@Haste@ Ability Haste</scaleAbilityHaste>.

augments.name: Minionmancer
augments.desc: Your summons gain @MinionAmp*100@% increased size, health, and damage.
augments.tooltip: Your summons gain @MinionAmp*100@% increased size, health, and damage.

augments.name: Stackosaurus Rex
augments.desc: When you gain permanent <keywordMajor>Stacks</keywordMajor> of an Ability, gain @StackModifier*100@% more!
augments.tooltip: When you gain permanent <keywordMajor>Stacks</keywordMajor> of an Ability, gain @StackModifier*100@% more!

augments.name: Sacrifice: For Prismatic
augments.desc:
Sacrifice @HealthReduction*100@% of your current health.

After @RoundCountCap@ rounds, gain a bonus Prismatic Augment and restore your health.
augments.tooltip:
Sacrifice @HealthReduction*100@% of your current health.

After @RoundCountCap@ rounds, gain a bonus Prismatic Augment and restore your health.

augments.name: 404 Augment Not Found
augments.desc:
How did you find this?!?!?

Gain @HatsToGrant@ hats.
augments.tooltip:
How did you find this?!?!?

Gain @HatsToGrant@ hats.

augments.name: Homeguard
augments.desc: Gain <speed>@spell.Augment_Homeguard:MovementSpeed*100@% Move Speed</speed>, disabled for @spell.Augment_Homeguard:DisableCooldown@ seconds after taking damage.
augments.tooltip: Gain <speed>@spell.Augment_Homeguard:MovementSpeed*100@% Move Speed</speed>, disabled for @spell.Augment_Homeguard:DisableCooldown@ seconds after taking damage.

augments.name: ADAPt
augments.desc: Convert <scaleAD>Bonus Attack Damage</scaleAD> to <scaleAP>Ability Power</scaleAP>. Gain <scaleAP>@APAmp*100@% Ability Power</scaleAP>.
augments.tooltip:
Convert Bonus Attack Damage to Ability Power, and gain @APAmpCalcTooltip@ Ability Power.

Current Conversion: @f1@

Converts at a rate of @ConversionRate@ Ability Power per point of Attack Damage.

augments.name: Leg Day
augments.desc: Gain <speed>@MovementSpeed@ Movement Speed</speed> and <speed>@SlowResist*100@% Slow Resist</speed>.
augments.tooltip: Gain <speed>@MovementSpeed@ Movement Speed</speed> and <speed>@SlowResist*100@% Slow Resist</speed>.

augments.name: Augment 405
augments.desc: Gain @DamageAmpPerHat*100@% damage per hat you're wearing.
augments.tooltip: Gain @DamageAmpPerHat*100@% damage per hat you're wearing.

augments.name: Dawnbringer's Resolve
augments.desc: Upon dropping below <scaleHealth>@HealthThreshold*100@% Health</scaleHealth>, <healing>heal for @HealCalc@ over @HealDuration@ seconds</healing>.
augments.tooltip: {{Cherry_DawnbringersResolve_Summary}}

augments.name: escAPADe
augments.desc: Convert <scaleAP>Ability Power</scaleAP> to <scaleAD>Bonus Attack Damage</scaleAD>. Gain <scaleAD>@ADAmp*100@% Attack Damage</scaleAD>.
augments.tooltip:
Convert Ability Power to Bonus Attack Damage and gain @ADAmpCalcTooltip@ Attack Damage.

Current Conversion: @f1@

Converts at a rate of @ConversionRate@ Attack Damage per point of Ability Power.

augments.name: Defensive Maneuvers
augments.desc:
Gain the Defensive Maneuvers Summoner Spell.

Defensive Maneuvers Casts both Summoner Barrier and Heal on your team.
augments.tooltip: Cast <spellName>Barrier</spellName> and <spellName>Heal</spellName> on your team. Grants <shield>@BarrierAmount@ Shield</shield>, restores <healing>@HealAmount@ Health</healing>, and gives <speed>@MoveSpeed*100@% Move Speed</speed> for 1 second.

augments.name: Deft
augments.desc: Gain %i:scaleAS% @AttackSpeed*100@% <speed>Attack Speed</speed>.
augments.tooltip: Gain %i:scaleAS% @AttackSpeed*100@% <speed>Attack Speed</speed>.

augments.name: Twice Thrice
augments.desc: Every @ProcCadence@ attacks, your {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} effects trigger a second time.
augments.tooltip: Every @ProcCadence@ attacks, your {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} effects trigger a second time.

augments.name: Hold Very Still
augments.desc:
Gain Guerrilla Warfare.

Not moving causes you to turn Invisibile until you move. Exiting this Invisibility, causes your next attack to deal bonus magic damage.
augments.tooltip:
Gain Guerrilla Warfare

After not moving for @HoldStillDuration@ seconds, turn Invisibile until you move. When you exit this Invisibility, gain @BonusAS@ Attack Speed and @BonusMS*100@% decaying Movement Speed for @ASDuration@ seconds. Your next attack deals an additional @BonusHitDamage@ magic damage.

augments.name: Demon's Dance
augments.desc: Gain the Fleet Footwork and Grasp of the Undying Keystone Runes.
augments.tooltip:
Gain the Fleet Footwork and Grasp of the Undying Keystone Runes.

Fleet Footwork - Moving and Attacking generates charges of Energize. At 100, your next Attack deals bonus damage, heals you, and grants you a burst of Move Speed.

Grasp of the Undying - Being in combat for 3 seconds with an enemy marks them. Attacks consume the mark to deal bonus damage, heal you, and grant permanent max Health.

augments.name: Die Another Day
augments.desc:
Gain the Die Another Day Summoner Spell.

Die Another Day creates a zone where no unit can die for 4 seconds.
augments.tooltip: Bless the ground under you for 4s, preventing any unit inside from falling <scaleHealth>below 10% of their max Health</scaleHealth>. At the end, units inside are healed for <healing>@HealFlatTooltip@ Health</healing>.

augments.name: Self Destruct
augments.desc: Every @BombDelay@ seconds <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor>, attach a bomb to yourself, it explodes, dealing <trueDamage>massive true damage</trueDamage> and <status>Knocking Up</status> nearby enemies.
augments.tooltip: Every @BombDelay@ seconds <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor>, attach a bomb to yourself, it explodes, dealing <trueDamage>@MaxHealthDamage*100@% max Health true damage</trueDamage> and <status>Knocks Up</status> nearby enemies for @KnockupDuration@ seconds.

augments.name: Orbital Laser
augments.desc:
Replace Summoner Flee with Orbital Laser.

After a delay, call down an orbital laser that deals @DamagetoChampions*100@% max Health true damage plus @TotalDamageOverTimeTooltip@ magic damage over @GroundDuration@ seconds.
augments.tooltip:
{{Cherry_OrbitalLaser_Summary}}

Damage Dealt This Round:@f1@
Damage Dealt Total:@f2@

augments.name: Firefox
augments.desc:
Autocast
Gain Movement Speed and conjure three flames that orbit you, targetting the closest visible enemy in range and dealing magic damage.
augments.tooltip: <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor>: Gain <speed>@MovementSpeed*100@% Movement Speed</speed> and conjure three flames that orbit you every @Cooldown@ seconds, targetting the closest visible enemy in range and dealing <magicDamage>@SingleFireDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage>. Subsequent hits do @RepeatDamageMod*100@% damage.

augments.name: Dive Bomber
augments.desc: Your team's first death each round explodes, dealing <trueDamage>massive damage true damage</trueDamage>.
augments.tooltip:
Your team's first death each round explodes, dealing @PercentMaxHPDamage*100@% of the targets max health as true damage to nearby enemies.

Damage Dealt This Round: @f1@
Damage Dealt Total: @f2@

augments.name: Oathsworn
augments.desc:
Replace Flee with Fate's Call.

Fate's Call making your ally Untargetable for up to 4 seconds. your ally can launch themself out, Knocking Back enemies.
augments.tooltip:
Replace Flee with Fate's Call.

Fate's Call making your ally Untargetable for up to 4 seconds. your ally can launch themself out, Knocking Back enemies.

augments.name: Don't Blink
augments.desc: Gain @BonusDamagePerMSDifference*1000@% bonus damage per <speed>10 Move Speed</speed> you have more than the target.
augments.tooltip:
Gain @BonusDamagePerMSDifference*1000@% bonus damage per 10 Move Speed you have more than the target.

Bonus Damage This Round: @f1@
Bonus Damage Total: @f2@

augments.name: And My Axe!
augments.desc:
Autocast:
Periodically throws an axe at the nearest opponent, dealing physical damage, slowing, and shredding their armor and magic resist. Picking up the axe reduces its Cooldown.
augments.tooltip:
Autocast: Throws an axe at the nearest opponent every @Cooldown@s, dealing @TotalDamage@ physical damage, Slowing the target for @SlowAmount*100@% for @SlowDuration@s, and shredding @ShredAmount*100@% Armor and Magic Resist for @DebuffDuration@ seconds.

Picking up this axes reduces its Cooldown (%i:cooldown%) to @CDIfPickedUp@s.

augments.name: Earthwake
augments.desc: Your dash, blink, or teleport Abilities leave behind a trail that detonates after 1 second.
augments.tooltip:
Your dash, leap, blink, or teleport Abilities leave behind a trail that detonates after 1 second, dealing @Damage@ physical damage.

Damage Dealt This Round: @f1@
Damage Dealt Total: @f2@

augments.name: Clothesline
augments.desc: There is a tether connecting your team, deals constant <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> to enemies it touches.
augments.tooltip:
There is a tether connecting your team, deals constant @BurnDamageTooltip@ magic damage per second to those it touches.

Damage Dealt this Round: @f1@
Damage Dealt Total: @f2@

augments.name: Erosion
augments.desc: Damaging enemies adds a stacking <scaleArmor>Armor</scaleArmor> and <scaleMR>Magic Resist</scaleMR> shred for @ShredDuration@s.
augments.tooltip: Damaging enemies shreds @Shred*100@% <scaleArmor>Armor</scaleArmor> and <scaleMR>Magic Resist</scaleMR> for @ShredDuration@s, up to @MaxShredTooltipOnly@% at @MaxStacks@ stacks.

augments.name: Clown College
augments.desc:
Gain Deceive Summoner Spell.

Deceive: You teleport and become Invisible. Your next Attack while Invisible deals an additional physical damage.

When you die, spawn an exploding box that deals a large amount of true damage and Fear nearby enemies.
augments.tooltip:
Backstab: You deal @BasicAttackDamage@ bonus physical damage when striking from behind.

Deceive: You teleport and become Invisible for @StealthDuration@ seconds. Your next Attack while Invisible deals an additional @TotalDamage@ physical damage. If striking from behind, this Attack critically strikes for @QCritDamageMod@ damage.

Hallucinate: Death: On death, deal @FearDamage*100@% maximum Health true damage and fear for @FearDuration@s around you.

augments.name: Ethereal Weapon
augments.desc: Your Abilities apply {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} effects.
augments.tooltip:
Your Abilities apply {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }} effects @HitCount@ time(s) . @Cooldown@ second cooldown per target.

Times Triggered This Round: @f1@
Times Triggered Total: @f2@

augments.name: Eureka
augments.desc: Gain <scaleAbilityHaste>Ability Haste</scaleAbilityHaste> equal to <scaleAP>@APToHasteConversion*100@% Ability Power</scaleAP>.
augments.tooltip: Gain <scaleAbilityHaste>@APToHasteConversionCalc@ Ability Haste</scaleAbilityHaste>.

augments.name: It's Killing Time
augments.desc:
After casting your Ultimate, mark all enemy champions for death.

While marked, store damage dealt to them, and detonate the damage when the mark ends.
augments.tooltip: After casting your <keywordMajor>Ultimate</keywordMajor>, mark all enemy champions for death. The mark stores @DamageStorePercentage*100@% of damage dealt to them, then detonates for the stored damage after @MarkDuration@ seconds. (@Cooldown@ second Cooldown).

augments.name: Overflow
augments.desc:
Your Mana costs are doubled.

Your Ability Heals, Shields, and damage are increased based on your max Mana.
augments.tooltip: Your <scaleMana>Mana</scaleMana> costs double. Your Ability <healing>Heals</healing>, <shield>Shields</shield>, and damage are <scaleMana>@ManaCalc@</scaleMana> more effective.

augments.name: Executioner
augments.desc: Deal @BonusDamage*100@% more damage to enemies below @HealthThreshold*100@% health. Reset your basic abilities on takedown.
augments.tooltip:
Deal @BonusDamage*100@% more damage to enemies below @HealthThreshold*100@% health. Reset your basic abilities on takedown.

Bonus Damage This Round: @f1@
Bonus Damage Total: @f2@

augments.name: Ultimate Unstoppable
augments.desc: After using your Ultimate, you become immune to <status>crowd control</status> for @UnstoppableDuration@ seconds. (@Cooldown@ second Cooldown).
augments.tooltip: After using your Ultimate, you become immune to <status>crowd control</status> for @UnstoppableDuration@ seconds. (@Cooldown@ second Cooldown).

augments.name: Extendo-Arm
augments.desc: <keywordMajor>Autocast</keywordMajor> fire a Blitzcrank hook every 12 seconds at a nearby enemy champion.
augments.tooltip:
Autocast fire a Blitzcrank hook every 12 seconds at a nearby enemy champion.

Hooks Landed: @f1@

augments.name: We'll Be Right Back
augments.desc:
Gain Time Stop Summoner Spell.

Time Stop: ALL nearby champions are put in Stasis. The Stasis is shorter on you, and during it you Heal based on missing Health.
augments.tooltip: <spellName>Time Stop</spellName>: All nearby champions are put in <status>Stasis</status> for @StasisDuration@ seconds, or @SelfDuration@ seconds for you. During which you restore <healing>@HealAmountPercent*100@% missing Health</healing>.

augments.name: Fallen Aegis
augments.desc:
Start combat with a Black Shield for @ShieldDuration@s.

Black Shield blocks Magic Damage and Immobilizing effects.
augments.tooltip:
Start combat with a Black Shield that blocks @ShieldAmount@ magic damage for @ShieldDuration@s. The shield prevents Disabling and Immobilizing effects until it breaks.

Immobilizing Spells Blocked Total: @f2@

augments.name: Skilled Sniper
augments.desc: Hitting an enemy with a <keywordMajor>non-Ultimate Ability</keywordMajor> at far range drastically reduces its Cooldown.
augments.tooltip: Hitting an enemy with a non-Ultimate Ability at over @SnipeDistance@ range reduces its Cooldown to @ReducedCooldown@ seconds, periodic abilities are instead reset to @PeriodicReductionAmount@ seconds.

augments.name: Feel the Burn
augments.desc:
Gain the Feel the Burn Summoner Spell.

Feel the Burn casts Ignite and Exhaust on all nearby enemy champions.
augments.tooltip: <rules>Casts <spellName>Ignite</spellName> and <spellName>Exhaust</spellName> on all nearby enemy champions.</rules>

augments.name: Tank Engine
augments.desc: Gain increased size and <scaleHealth>percent bonus Health</scaleHealth> per takedown.
augments.tooltip:
Gain @SizeIncrement*100@% increase in size and @f2@% Bonus Health (@MaxHPIncrement*100@% (@f1@) per takedown).

Takedowns: @f3@

augments.name: Firebrand
augments.desc: Your Attacks apply an infinitely stacking <keywordMajor>Burn</keywordMajor> {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }}, dealing damage over time.
augments.tooltip:
Your Attacks Burn enemies {{ Item_Keyword_OnHit }}, dealing @PercentMaxHPDamagePer5Seconds*20@% max Health Magic Damage damage per second over @BleedDuration@ seconds. The Burn stacks infinitely.

Damage Dealt This Round: @f1@
Damage Dealt Total: @f2@

augments.name: First-Aid Kit
augments.desc: Gain <healing>@HealShieldAmp*100@% Heal and Shield Power</healing>.
augments.tooltip: Gain <healing>@HealShieldAmp*100@% Heal and Shield Power</healing>.

augments.name: Spin To Win
augments.desc: Your spin Abilities gain @SpinHaste@ Ability Haste and deal @SpinDamageAmp*100@% more damage!
augments.tooltip:
{{ Cherry_SpinToWin_Summary }}

Damage this round: @f1@
Damage this game: @f2@

augments.name: Unshackled
augments.desc:
You can now Hijack your ally's ultimate.

On takedown, reduce Hijack's lockout and cooldown by @TakedownRefund*100@%.

Gain @UltimateHaste@ Ultimate Haste.
augments.tooltip:
You can now Hijack your ally's ultimate.

On takedown, reduce Hijack's lockout and cooldown by @TakedownRefund*100@%.

Gain @UltimateHaste@ Ultimate Haste.

augments.name: From Beginning to End
augments.desc: Gain the <spellName>First Strike</spellName> and <spellName>Dark Harvest</spellName> Keystone Runes.
augments.tooltip:
Gain the First Strike and Dark Harvest Keystone Runes.
  • First Strike - Damaging a champion makes them take increased damage for 3 seconds. At the end, gain +%i:goldCoins% Gold based on your bonus damage dealt.
  • Dark Harvest - Damaging an enemy below 50% Health deals bonus damage and increases that bonus damage permanently.

augments.name: Scopiest Weapons
augments.desc: Gain @MeleeRangeIncrease@ Attack Range, reduced to @RangedRangeIncrease@ if you are Ranged.
augments.tooltip: Gain @MeleeRangeIncrease@ Attack Range, reduced to @RangedRangeIncrease@ if you are Ranged.

augments.name: Dark Blessing
augments.desc: <healing>Healing</healing> or <shield>Shielding</shield> an ally grants you permanent <keywordMajor>Cursed Power</keywordMajor>. Gain Ability Haste based on your <keywordMajor>Cursed Power</keywordMajor>.
augments.tooltip:
When you Heal or Shield an allied champion, gain @CurseCounter@ Cursed Power.

Gain @f1@ Ability Haste (@AbilityHasteRatio*100@% of your Cursed Power).

{{ Cherry_CurseShared }}

augments.name: Frost Wraith
augments.desc: Autocast Root nearby enemies for @RootDuration@ seconds every @Cooldown@ seconds.
augments.tooltip:
Autocast Root nearby enemies for @RootDuration@ seconds every @Cooldown@ seconds.

Enemies Rooted This Round: @f1@
Enemies Rooted Total: @f2@

augments.name: Frozen Foundations
augments.desc:
Gain the Frozen Foundations Summoner Spell.

Frozen Foundations summons a wall of ice at a location.
augments.tooltip: <rules>Summon a wall of ice at target location.</rules>

augments.name: Flashy
augments.desc: Your <spellName>Flash</spellName> has @MaxAmmo@ Ammo and a @FlashCooldown@ second Cooldown.
augments.tooltip: Your <spellName>Flash</spellName> has @MaxAmmo@ Ammo and a @FlashCooldown@ second Cooldown.

augments.name: Dreadbringer
augments.desc: Gain an aura that continuously harvests permanent <keywordMajor>Cursed Power</keywordMajor> per enemy champion inside. Gain <scaleHealth>max Health</scaleHealth> based on your <keywordMajor>Cursed Power</keywordMajor>.
augments.tooltip:
Every @TickCadence@ second, gain @CurseStacksPerTick@ Cursed Power per nearby enemy champion.

Gain @f1@ Health (@MaxHealthRatio*100@% of your Cursed Power).

{{ Cherry_CurseShared }}

augments.name: Grevious Venom
augments.desc: Dealing damage to an enemy champion reduces any <shield>shields</shield> they gain, and applies <status>Grievous Wounds</status>, reducing any <healing>healing</healing> they receive.
augments.tooltip:
Dealing damage to an enemy champion reduces any shields they gain by @ShieldShred@%, and applies @GrievousAmount*100@% Grievous Wounds for @DebuffDuration@ seconds.

If an enemy heals for more than @GrievousAmpThreshold*100@% of their maximum health while continously affected by Grievous Wounds, it is increased to @GrievousAmpAmount*100@% Grievous Wounds.

{{ Item_Grievous_Wounds }}

Only reduces General and Physical Damage shields, but not purely Magical Damage blocking shields.

augments.name: Goliath
augments.desc: Become large, gaining <scaleHealth>@HealthAmp*100@% Health</scaleHealth> and <scaleAF>@AFAmp*100@% Adaptive Force</scaleAF>.
augments.tooltip: Become large, gaining <scaleHealth>@HealthAmp*100@% Health</scaleHealth> and <scaleAF>@AFAmp*100@% Adaptive Force</scaleAF>.

augments.name: Guilty Pleasure
augments.desc: <status>Immobilizing</status> or <status>Grounding</status> enemy champions <healing>heals you</healing>.
augments.tooltip:
Immobilizing or Grounding enemy champions restores @TotalHeal@ Health.

Healing Done This Round: @f1@
Healing Done Total: @f2@

augments.name: Deathtouch
augments.desc: Attacking enemy champions grants permanent <keywordMajor>Cursed Power</keywordMajor> and deal additional <magicDamage>magic damage</magicDamage> based on your <keywordMajor>Cursed Power</keywordMajor>.
augments.tooltip:
Attacking enemy champions grant you @CurseCounter@ Cursed Power.

Your Attacks deal an additional @f1@ magic damage (@OnHitDamageRatio*100@% of your Cursed Power).

{{ Cherry_CurseShared }}

augments.name: Pandora's Box
augments.desc: Transmute all of your augments into <keywordMajor>random Prismatic%i:Augment% Augments</keywordMajor>.
augments.tooltip: Transmute all of your augments into <keywordMajor>random Prismatic%i:Augment% Augments</keywordMajor>.

augments.name: Now You See Me
augments.desc:
Gain the Now You See Me Summoner Spell.

Now You See Me teleports you back to the starting position of your last Movement Ability.
augments.tooltip:
Passive: Leave a mark behind whenever you use a Movement Ability.

Active: Return to a previous mark you've left. You then gain @MSBuffAmount*100@% Move Speed for @MSBuffDuration@ seconds.
